mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_model_domain t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbModelDomainEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{kbModelDomainEntity.name},'%')
AND t.pid like concat('%',#{kbModelDomainEntity.pid},'%')
AND t.url like concat('%',#{kbModelDomainEntity.url},'%')
AND t.key like concat('%',#{kbModelDomainEntity.key},'%')
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{kbModelDomainEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbModelDomainEntity.updateTime},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM kb_model_domain t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbModelDomainEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{kbModelDomainEntity.name},'%')
AND t.pid like concat('%',#{kbModelDomainEntity.pid},'%')
AND t.url like concat('%',#{kbModelDomainEntity.url},'%')
AND t.key like concat('%',#{kbModelDomainEntity.key},'%')
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{kbModelDomainEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbModelDomainEntity.updateTime},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_model_domain t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
